title: Buttery Chewy Algerian Haddock Stir-fry
description: A low-fat-friendly date-night dish featuring chewy haddock with a hint of butter and spices, ideal for quick weeknight meals.
instructions: Mix haddock with lemon juice in a shallow dish. Toss until evenly coated.
Drizzle olive oil over the seasoned haddock and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 8 minutes or until cooked through, flipping once halfway through cooking time.
While haddock is baking, prepare the sauce: In a small bowl, mix dijon mustard, lemon juice, minced garlic, jalapeno pepper (if using), and capers. Add in almond slivers and stir well to combine.
Once the haddock is done, remove from oven and let it rest for about 2 minutes before serving with sauce drizzled over top.
Serve immediately as a main dish or side to any meal.
